dialogue_texts: Hah! I guess you didn't need my purification after all, my Majesty.
That wasn't a ritual; it was just a flashy mugging. I demand a refund for the time we wasted.
Think of it as a royal tax. Consider my mandatory training a gift to the crown.
I'm the one who usually does the gift-taking around here.
Still, I haven't seen any person with the glohm.
If you're looking for something that stinks trouble, head toward the Amber Woods. The air is starting to rot there.
Rotting air? Sounds like a mess. I'll be taking my leave!
